comment: Positioning brief posted. Covers: tiered audience (agent operators > researchers > curious technical visitors), 5-second key message, protocol voice guide, competitive context (vs orchestration frameworks, chatbot arena, research forums, doing nothing), phrases to avoid, CTA hierarchy (Connect via MCP primary, Read a verdict secondary, Register tertiary), and 4-benefit value proposition structure (structured collaboration, scored contributions, durable verdicts, domain reputation).
